Example_EN: Please wash the dishes after dinner.
I need to do my homework before bed.
MemoryTip: do 万能动词，做事都用它。

Example_EN: You should see a doctor about that cough.
They walk their dog every evening.
MemoryTip: dog 与 cat 成对记。

Example_EN: Please open the door for the guests.
Please sit down and have some tea.
She left her bag downstairs by the door.
Example_CN: 她把包留在楼下门口了。

Collocation: draw a picture;draw the curtains;draw attention
Example_EN: The children love to draw pictures of animals.
MemoryTip: draw 既可画画也可拉开窗帘。

Example_EN: She bought a blue summer dress yesterday.
Example_CN: 她昨天买了一条蓝色夏裙。

Example_EN: Remember to drink enough water today.

Collocation: drive a car;drive to;go for a drive
Example_EN: He will drive us to the station later.
Example_CN: 他稍后会开车送我们去车站。

Example_EN: The bus driver waited for late passengers.
Example_CN: 公交司机等了迟到的乘客。

Example_EN: Hang the wet clothes somewhere dry.

Collocation: during the day;during class;during the night
Example_EN: Please keep quiet during the exam.
Each student received a small notebook.
Example_CN: 每位学生都领到一本小笔记本。

Example_EN: She listened carefully with one ear towards them.
Example_CN: 她侧着耳朵仔细听他们说话。

Example_EN: We woke early to catch the first train.
Example_CN: 我们起得很早去赶第一班火车。

Example_EN: They live on the east coast of Scotland.
Example_CN: 他们住在苏格兰东海岸。
MemoryTip: east 对 west，清晨太阳从东边来。

Example_EN: This puzzle is easy for young children.
Example_CN: 这个谜题对小孩来说很容易。

Example_EN: We usually eat breakfast together.
She boiled an egg for her breakfast.
The shop opens at eight o'clock sharp.
She turned eighteen last summer.
My grandmother is over eighty years old.
Example_CN: 我祖母已经八十多岁了。

Example_EN: You can take either train to the city.
Example_CN: 去城里坐哪趟火车都行。
MemoryTip: either 二选一；否定里也可用。

Example_EN: The children watched an elephant at the zoo.
Example_CN: 孩子们在动物园看大象。

Example_EN: The meeting starts at eleven o'clock.
Would you like anything else to drink?
Please send me an email with the details.
The bottle on the table is empty.

Collocation: at the end;end of term;end a call
Example_EN: We will meet at the end of the street.
I hope you enjoy the party tonight.
Example_CN: 希望你今晚在聚会上玩得开心。

Example_EN: We do not have enough time today.

Collocation: enter a room;enter data;enter the contest
Example_EN: Please enter your password carefully.
Shall we have dinner this evening?
She walks to work every day.
Everybody knows the new teacher's name.
Example_CN: 每个人都知道新老师的名字。

Example_EN: Everyone else had already left the room.
Example_CN: 其他人都已经离开房间了。

Example_EN: Don't worry, everything will be fine.
Example_CN: 别担心，一切都会没事的。

Example_EN: She has a maths exam next Monday.

Collocation: for example;give an example;set an example
Example_EN: For example, you can take the bus.
MemoryTip: ex + ample 举出来的样例。

Example_EN: The children feel excited about the trip.
Example_CN: 孩子们对这次旅行感到兴奋。

Example_EN: That match was the most exciting one this year.
Example_CN: 那场比赛是今年最精彩的。

Example_EN: I try to take some exercise every morning.
That watch is too expensive for me.
Example_CN: 那块表对我来说太贵了。

Example_EN: Can you explain this rule again please?
Example_CN: 请你再解释一下这条规则好吗？

Collocation: blue eyes;keep an eye on;eye contact
Example_EN: She has bright blue eyes like her mother.
Example_CN: 她有一双像妈妈一样明亮的蓝眼睛。

Collocation: wash your face;face a problem;smiling face
Example_EN: He washed his face with cold water.
In fact, she already knew the answer.
Example_CN: 事实上，她已经知道答案了。

Example_EN: His uncle works in a car factory.
Don't worry if you fail the first time.
Be careful not to fall on the wet floor.
Example_CN: 小心别在湿地板上摔倒。
MemoryTip: fall 落下，也可指秋天（美）。

Example_EN: Our family eats dinner together on Sundays.
Example_CN: 我们家周日一起吃晚饭。

Example_EN: The town is famous for its old castle.
Example_CN: 这座小镇因古堡而闻名。

Example_EN: The hotel is not far from the station.
They spent summer on a dairy farm.
Example_CN: 他们在一个奶牛场过了夏天。

Example_EN: The local farmer sells fresh vegetables.
Example_CN: 当地农民出售新鲜蔬菜。

Example_EN: The fast train arrives in under an hour.
Example_CN: 这趟快车不到一小时就到。

Example_EN: Choose the low fat yoghurt if you can.
His father teaches science at a school.
Example_CN: 他父亲在一所学校教科学。

Example_EN: Blue is still my favourite colour.
Example_CN: 蓝色仍是我最喜欢的颜色。

Example_EN: Her birthday is in early February.
I feel tired after the long walk.
Example_CN: 走了很长一段路后我感觉累了。
MemoryTip: feel 心里或手上的感觉。

Example_EN: She had a strong feeling that something was wrong.
Example_CN: 她强烈感到事情不对劲。

Example_EN: The town holds a music festival each summer.
Example_CN: 这座小镇每年夏天举办音乐节。

Example_EN: Only a few people stayed until the end.
Example_CN: 只有少数人坚持到最后。
MemoryTip: a few 有一些；few 几乎没有。

Example_EN: Cows were eating grass in the green field.
Example_CN: 奶牛在绿油油的田野里吃草。

Example_EN: The bus will leave in fifteen minutes.
He has lived here for fifty years.
Please fill the bottle with clean water.

Collocation: watch a film;film festival;film a scene
Example_EN: Shall we watch a film tonight?
MemoryTip: 英式常说 film 指电影。

Example_EN: She made a final decision to stay.
The train finally arrived after a long delay.
Example_CN: 延误很久后火车终于到了。

Collocation: find a key;find out;find it hard
Example_EN: I cannot find my keys anywhere.
The weather looks fine for a picnic.
She burned her finger while cooking.
I need to finish this report today.
Example_CN: 我今天需要完成这份报告。

Example_EN: Everyone left when the fire alarm rang.
Example_CN: 火警响起时大家都离开了。

Example_EN: This is my first time in London.
We ordered fish and chips by the sea.
Example_CN: 我们在海边点了炸鱼薯条。

Example_EN: The shop closes in five minutes.
They rented a small flat near campus.
Example_CN: 他们在校园附近租了一套小公寓。

Example_EN: Our flight leaves at six in the morning.
Example_CN: 我们的航班早上六点起飞。

Example_EN: Please leave your shoes on the floor.
She bought flowers for her teacher's desk.
Example_CN: 她给老师的课桌买了花。

Example_EN: We will fly home next Thursday.
Please follow the rules during the test.
They bought healthy food at the market.
Example_CN: 他们在市场买了健康食品。

Example_EN: We went to the park on foot.
The boys play football after school.
This gift is for you from all of us.
Example_CN: 这件礼物是我们大家送给你的。

Example_EN: Don't forget to lock the door tonight.

Collocation: fill in a form;application form;form a line
Example_EN: Please fill in this form carefully.
The journey takes about forty minutes.
Example_CN: 行程大约需要四十分钟。

Example_EN: There are four people in our team.
She will be fourteen next month.
I have some free time this afternoon.
Example_CN: 我今天下午有些空闲时间。

Example_EN: Open the window for some fresh air.
See you on Friday after class.
She met her best friend at school.
Example_CN: 她在学校遇见了最好的朋友。
MemoryTip: friend 里有 end，善始善终的朋友。
